obligation.goal:
forall z : Tree,
iff (member z (intersection x y)) (and (member z x) (member z y))

nodes.proof:
intros z; split.
- intro H. apply (filter_spec (fun w => member w x) y) in H. destruct H as [c [Hmemc Hzeq]]. sauto.
- intro H. destruct H as [Hx [c Heq]]. apply (filter_spec (fun w => member w x) y). exists c; split; [rewrite Heq in Hx; exact Hx | exact Heq].
attempts: intros z; rewrite filter_spec; unfold member; split; firstorder.

intros z; split.
- intro H. apply (filter_spec (fun w => member w x) y) in H. destruct H as [c [Hmemc Hzeq]]. sauto.
- intro H. destruct H as [Hx [c Heq]]. apply (filter_spec (fun w => member w x) y). exists c; split; [rewrite Heq in Hx; exact Hx | exact Heq].
intros z. unfold intersection. apply filter_correct. split; intros [H1 H2]; split; assumption.
intros z. unfold intersection. rewrite filter_member. simpl. apply and_comm.
failed_attempts: intros z; rewrite filter_spec; unfold member; split; firstorder.
intros z. unfold intersection. apply filter_correct. split; intros [H1 H2]; split; assumption.
intros z. unfold intersection. rewrite filter_member. simpl. apply and_comm.
